description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and large vertical windows on the main facade. The front features a raised entryway with steps, a covered patio area, and three parked cars, suggesting a driveway or parking area. The house has multiple outdoor seating areas, including a round table with chairs and a shaded terrace on the first floor. The rear and side views reveal a spacious balcony and a landscaped garden area with palm trees and shrubbery. The exterior is primarily white with some gray and beige accents, and the windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The exterior is white with gray accents and features a landscaped garden and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three parked cars, a covered patio, and outdoor dining area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, cars, and landscaped garden with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with minimal windows and a clear view of the rooftop and interior layout.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the entry steps, vertical windows, terrace, and both the driveway and garden areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entry with steps, covered patio, and large glass door, flanked by outdoor seating and minimal decorative elements.
